narrative:
New Middletown Village has 1,070 registered voters, with 52.0% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 17.6% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 30.5%, a pronounced Democratic lean of 12.9 percentage points.
